storyHook: 打扫房间，归置物品，休息

narrative.when: 周日上午，房间已经乱了一周
narrative.who: 甲（房间主人）· 乙（来串门的朋友）
narrative.how: 一边整理一边和朋友聊天
narrative.method: 打扫地面、把书放回书架、整理床铺、坐下来休息
narrative.event: 乙下午要来家里，甲想趁早把房间收拾干净

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What a dirty room this is.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have not cleaned it for a week.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. I will do it now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: May I give you a hand?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind, but I will do it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have many books on the floor.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will put them back on the shelf.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And your bed is not made.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that after the floor.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will be here then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, first the floor.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the brush.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good, I will move my feet.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are a great help.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right, I am only seated.
turns.zh: 那当然，我只是坐着而已。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, here is the brush.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I will start from the edge.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: May I move those books?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, put them on the bed for now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These are all over the place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. I let them be for a week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put them by size.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. Then they go on the shelf.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The shelf is full. What about these?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make space. Give me a minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take these to the shelf now.
turns.zh: 我现在把这些拿上书架。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do you have a place for them?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will put them on the top shelf.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That shelf is high. Do you need a hand?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I am tall enough. Thanks.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will clean the floor while you do that.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The dust is thick here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the thing for dust. Keep the dust together.
turns.zh: 我去拿簸箕，你把灰扫成一堆。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a small group now. Ready for you.
turns.zh: 我扫了一小堆了，等你来收。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here I come. That is much dust.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, the floor looks clean now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good work. Now for the books on the table.
turns.zh: 干得好。现在来弄桌上的书。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put them back on the shelf.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Give you the ones on the left?
turns.zh: 要我把左边的递给你吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, please. Then we will make the bed.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here are the books from the left.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put them in order by size.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That one has a loose page. Keep it separate.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it on the end. Now for the bed.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us take off the old cloth first?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and give it a good shake out the window.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cushion is flat. I will make it soft.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then we put on the clean cover.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Pull your side tight. That is straight now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The room is clean and ordered.
turns.zh: 很好，房间干净又整齐了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now for the floor. I will get the brush.
turns.zh: 现在弄地板，我去拿扫帚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give you a hand. Where is the box for dust?
turns.zh: 我帮你，装灰尘的盒子在哪儿？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Under the table. I will put the dust in a little mass.
turns.zh: 桌子底下，我把灰扫成一堆。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will keep the box still for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the last of it. Now for the books on the shelf.
turns.zh: 扫干净了，现在弄书架上的书。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Some are the wrong way. Let us put them right.
turns.zh: 有几本放反了，我们正过来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the great ones first. They go on the lowest part.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And the small ones on top. That looks better.
turns.zh: 小的放上面，这样好看多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put the clothes from the seat in the basket.
turns.zh: 把座位上的衣服放进篮子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will fold them for you. You do the rest of the room.
turns.zh: 我帮你叠，你弄房间其他地方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now for the bed. It is a great mass of cloth.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take the cover off first, yes?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, yes, and give it a good shake out the window.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the other side. Pull hard.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, that is flat now. Make the head rest soft.
turns.zh: 好了，现在平了，把枕头拍松。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give it a soft touch or two. There, soft again.
turns.zh: 我轻轻拍两下，好了，又软了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now put the cover back. Push the ends under.
turns.zh: 现在套上被罩，把边塞进去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are good at this. It is like new.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And the floor near the door.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the brush. You have a rest.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, the floor is clean now. What about the books?
turns.zh: 好了，地板干净了。书怎么办？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put them back on the shelf. Some are out of order.
turns.zh: 我把它们放回书架。有些乱了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me give you a hand. Which ones go where?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great ones on the left, small ones on the right. That is the way.
turns.zh: 大的左边，小的右边。就这样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one has a loose page. Do you have paste?
turns.zh: 这本掉页了。你有胶水吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, in the drawer. I will put it right in a bit.
turns.zh: 有，在抽屉里。我一会儿弄好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. And the clothes on the seat?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will fold them and put them away. Keep going.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have a number of shirts. Do you put them on?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not all, but I keep them. One day, if I have a use.
turns.zh: 不全穿，但留着。哪天有用再说。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, the floor is clean now. What about the bed?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will make it. Give me a minute.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You do well with the cloth. It is flat.
turns.zh: 你床单铺得真顺。很平整。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is not hard. Just a pull and a fold.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now the room looks like a room again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I am happy with it. Let me get the dust off the shelf.
turns.zh: 嗯。我很满意。我来擦擦书架上的灰。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that. You take a rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I am good. Two hands are quicker.
turns.zh: 不用，我没事。两只手更快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then I will put the last books in order.
turns.zh: 好的。那我把最后几本书排好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. The room is clean and the air is new.
turns.zh: 搞定。房间干净，空气也新鲜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, all that is done. Let us have a rest.
turns.zh: 好了，都弄完了。我们歇会儿吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. My back is a bit tired.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here, take the seat. I will be on the bed.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. This room is like a new place now.
turns.zh: 谢了。这房间现在跟新的一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Hard morning, but it was good.
turns.zh: 是啊。忙了一早上，但挺好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get us some water. You look dry.
turns.zh: 我去倒点水。你看起来渴了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That would be great. Two cups, please.
turns.zh: 那太好了。请拿两个杯子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you are. Not too cold, just right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. So, what are you doing this week?
turns.zh: 好的。那你这周有什么安排？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have work on day two, but the other days are free.
turns.zh: 周二有工作，但其他日子都空着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am free on day three. Are you free?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds good. Where to?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the gardens? The sun is out.
turns.zh: 去公园怎么样？出太阳了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will get some food.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. I will make some bread with meat.
turns.zh: 太好了。我做点夹肉的面包。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No sharp bits, please. You have my number.
turns.zh: 别放辣的。你知道我的口味。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh! Yes, I will keep it soft.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are a good friend.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right back at you. Now rest a bit.
turns.zh: 彼此彼此。现在休息会儿吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. This is the best part of the day.
turns.zh: 是啊。这是一天中最舒服的时候。

storyBlurb: 周日上午，甲的房间乱成一团，他决定趁乙来串门前彻底打扫。扫地、放书、铺床，最后两人坐在整洁的房间里，享受清爽的周日。
storyScript:
【开场·房间很乱】周日早晨的阳光透过窗帘缝隙，照在甲房间的地板上，灰尘在光柱里飞舞。一周没收拾，衣服堆在椅子上，书本散落一地，床单皱成一团。甲叹了口气，想起乙下午要来，决定动手整理。他撸起袖子，先打开窗户让新鲜空气进来，然后从角落拿起扫帚。

【进行·打扫归置】甲弯下腰，扫帚划过地板，灰尘和碎屑聚成小堆。他弯腰把纸屑和头发扫进簸箕，倒进垃圾桶。接着是书桌，他把散落的书本一本本捡起，按大小排列放回书架。有几本旧书掉了页，他小心夹好，放回原处。床铺也乱得不成样子，他甩开被单，用力抖平，再把枕头拍松，叠好被子。这时乙推门进来，笑着说：你这房间终于能见人了。甲擦擦汗，继续把最后几件衣服叠好放进衣柜。

【收束·休息满意】半小时后，房间焕然一新。地板干净发亮，书架整齐，床铺平整。甲和乙坐在床边，阳光洒在两人身上，空气里飘着清洁后的淡淡香味。甲倒了杯水，递给乙，自己也喝了一口。乙环顾四周，点头说：这样多舒服。甲笑着靠在床头，心里觉得这一上午的辛苦很值得。两人聊起下周的计划，房间里只有轻松的笑声和窗外偶尔传来的鸟鸣。
